systemAnalysis.systemImpact: This change will activate and configure the data synchronization between Mautic and SuiteCRM. Incorrect mapping could lead to data inconsistency. A full data sync will be required after applying the changes, which may cause a temporary increase in server load.

executionSteps.description: Create a comprehensive documentation file outlining the field mapping, custom field handling, and conflict resolution strategy. This file serves as the primary artifact for this configuration task.

files.change: Create a new markdown file with the following content: Title, Overview, Step-by-step configuration guide for the Mautic UI, a table of field mappings, a section on custom fields, and a section on the conflict resolution strategy.

executionSteps.description: Manually apply the configuration in the Mautic UI based on the created documentation. This involves navigating to the SuiteCRM plugin settings and entering the field mappings.
commands: echo 'Navigate to Mautic > Settings > Plugins > SuiteCRM'
echo 'Go to the Feature tab, enable contact sync.'
echo 'Go to the Field Mapping tab and configure the mappings as per MAUTIC_SUITECRM_FIELD_MAPPING.md.'

executionSteps.description: After applying the settings in the UI, trigger a manual synchronization from the Mautic server's command line to ensure the new mappings are applied.

rollbackPlan: Navigate to the Mautic UI > Settings > Plugins > SuiteCRM.
Go to the Field Mapping tab and remove the mappings configured in this story.
Disable the contact sync feature if it was not previously enabled.
